body_excerpt: In createTransmitFollowupRequest of nan.cpp, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a heap buffer overflow. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In createTransmitFollowupRequest of nan.cpp, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a heap buffer overflow. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges ne
